programme.title: Who Knew?
programme.desc: A thematic series of stories from "Cheddar News Originals' Explains, Explores and Examines."

programme.title: Bad Milo!
programme.desc: A stressed-out man (Ken Marino) discovers that a tiny demon lives in his intestine, and that excessive anxiety causes the creature to escape and slaughter the man's tormentors.

programme.title: Murder Party
programme.desc: A satanic group lures a man to a party in order to murder him.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: Funhouse
programme.desc: Down-and-out backup singer and celebrity ex-husband Kasper is invited to compete in the Funhouse, an online reality show.

programme.title: VHS
programme.desc: Hired to steal a rare VHS tape from a remote house, a ragtag band of crooks finds a dead body, old TVs and a lot of cryptic footage.

programme.title: VHS 2
programme.desc: As they search for clues to the whereabouts of a missing student, a couple view the ghastly stories recorded on a collection of videotapes.

programme.title: VHS: Viral
programme.desc: A police chase through the streets of Los Angeles inspires dozens of fame-obsessed teens to try to capture the salacious footage, but they are unaware that they will face their own deaths as stars of the next video sensation.

programme.title: Malice in Wonderland
programme.desc: In London a cab hits a law student, who then goes to a land filled with riffraff.

programme.title: The Signal
programme.desc: A woman (Anessa Ramsey) and her lover (Justin Welborn) get caught up in the madness and must escape when a mysterious transmission turns people into murderous lunatics.

programme.title: Deadfall
programme.desc: En route to Canada with stolen casino loot, a thief (Olivia Wilde) separates from her brother (Eric Bana) and falls in with a boxer (Charlie Hunnam) who's on his way home for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Riders of Justice
programme.desc: Markus returns home to care for his daughter when his wife dies in a tragic train accident. However, when a survivor of the wreck surfaces and claims foul play, Markus suspects his wife was murdered and embarks on a mission to find those responsible.

programme.title: 12 Hour Shift
programme.desc: Bodies start to pile up when a drug-addicted nurse and her crazed cousin try to find a replacement kidney for an organ trafficker.

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: A young woman is transported to another world where a never-ending war is raging. There, a clutch of women lure men to their deaths at sea via radio transmissions, like 20th-century sirens. She soon realizes she's not the killer they want her to be.

programme.title: The Sorcerer and the White Snake
programme.desc: A sorcerer (Jet Li) battles against a barrage of demon temptresses to save a man's soul from an ancient serpent that was brought to life and disguised as a woman.

programme.title: Mr. Nobody: Extended Director's Cut
programme.desc: In 2092, the last mortal human on Earth reflects on his long past and thinks about the lives he might have led.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: A monk investigates rumors of people being resurrected during an outbreak of the bubonic plague.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A killer stalks members (Danny Dyer, Laura Harris, Tim McInnerny) of a sales group from an international arms company, who have become lost in the woods during a team-building weekend.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: A South Korean family (Song Kang-ho, Byun Hee-bong) must save a daughter (Go Ah-sung) from a horrible monster that emerged from the Han River.

programme.title: A Kind of Murder
programme.desc: An unhappily married man (Patrick Wilson) becomes fascinated by the case of a man (Eddie Marsan) suspected of murdering his wife and begins to imagine what it would be like to murder his own wife.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: The Wave
programme.desc: A Norwegian geologist (Kristoffer Joner) and his family (Ane Dahl Torp, Jonas Hoff Oftebro) fight for survival when a massive landslide causes a 250-foot tidal wave.

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: A geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake strikes Oslo, Norway.

programme.title: The Burning Sea
programme.desc: A submarine operator descends to the ocean floor to save the man she loves from a sunken oil rig.

programme.title: Centurion
programme.desc: A Roman soldier (Michael Fassbender) and his small band of fellow survivors try desperately to find a safe haven, as their relentless Pict pursuers pick them off one by one.

programme.title: The Unthinkable
programme.desc: Sweden is under attack by an unknown force, and in the midst of the chaos, Alex tries to reunite with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Blackthorn
programme.desc: Leaving Bolivia and heading back to the U.S., the outlaw formerly known as Butch Cassidy (Sam Shepard) has a final adventure.

programme.title: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: Little Joe
programme.desc: A plant created via genetic engineering appears to produce curious changes in the people and animals it comes into contact with.

programme.title: Gridlocked
programme.desc: A former S.W.A.T leader and the arrogant movie star shadowing him must organize the surviving members of a training facility against a team of mercenaries who have seized the compound.

programme.title: Ip Man: Kung Fu Master
programme.desc: Framed for the murder of a ruthless but honorable mobster, Ip Man becomes targeted for vengeance by his dangerous daughter. Forced to resign as police captain, Ip must also contend with the arrival of the Japanese army in Guangzhou, China.

programme.title: Honeymoon
programme.desc: A honeymooning bride (Rose Leslie) goes sleepwalking into the woods surrounding a secluded cabin. When she returns she looks the same, but something about her is frighteningly different.

programme.title: Agnes
programme.desc: Two priests travel to a convent when a nun shows signs of demonic possession.

programme.title: The Job
programme.desc: A drifter (Ron Perlman) gives an unemployed man (Patrick Flueger) a lead on a job he cannot refuse.

programme.title: 13 Assassins
programme.desc: Unemployed samurai are hired to kill a sadistic lord before he plunges Japan into war.

programme.title: The Protector 2
programme.desc: Martial artist Kham must rescue his beloved elephant from poachers and thwart a plot to start a war.

programme.title: The Guilty
programme.desc: Alarm dispatcher and former police officer Asger Holm answers an emergency call from a kidnapped woman. When the call is suddenly disconnected, the search for the woman and her kidnapper begins.

programme.title: Compliance
programme.desc: A fast-food worker (Dreama Walker) who's accused of theft is put through the wringer as her boss (Ann Dowd), at the direction of a phone caller who says he's a cop, subjects her to increasingly harsh forms of interrogation.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: Fueled by alcohol and revenge, a law student (Tye Sheridan) finds himself in over his head when a volatile grifter (Emory Cohen) agrees to drive to Las Vegas to kill his stepfather (Stephen Moyer) for $20,000.

programme.title: Love Served Here
programme.desc: A high-end restaurant chef is passed over for promotion and bets that she can turn around the worst restaurant in the city. She starts to fall for the curmudgeonly owner and realizes the key ingredient she's been missing is love.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Myles' sister's law firm is suspected of being dirty.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue and Jack go undercover to investigate a possible mob connection in a murder that Sue's snitch witnesses.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: When Sue and the team track the source of a cache of illegal visas, they are disturbed to learn what's really for sale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Two of Cousin Pearl's most ardent former suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills; Jed doesn't know what to suggest.

programme.title: The Date Whisperer
programme.desc: Date whispering is the hottest new trend in dating - a personal love coach right in your ear as you date your ideal match. And of all the date whisperers in LA, Sam is one of the best.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: Molly, a talented, scrupulous content creator, gets a surprise assignment to chronicle her newfound singlehood, but she's paired with Jackson -- her polar opposite.

programme.title: What We Do for Love
programme.desc: When Sophie secures a job at the famous mediation and wellness firm, she dives headfirst into her new role; she finds herself at odds with the company's chief life coach Jason Sharpe, who is the son of the firm's president.

programme.title: The Date Whisperer
programme.desc: Date whispering is the hottest new trend in dating - a personal love coach right in your ear as you date your ideal match. And of all the date whisperers in LA, Sam is one of the best.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: Molly, a talented, scrupulous content creator, gets a surprise assignment to chronicle her newfound singlehood, but she's paired with Jackson -- her polar opposite.

programme.title: What We Do for Love

programme.title: Gallowwalkers
programme.desc: Aman (Wesley Snipes) is cursed in the womb, and as an adult, anyone he kills rises as the walking dead. Being relentlessly pursued, the gunfighter enlists the aid of a young warrior to confront the zombies.

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: A traumatized shark expert (Halle Berry) must battle her own fears to lead a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into a dangerous section of water known as "Shark Alley."

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, a man (William DeMeo) scoffs at the chance to earn an honest living in his father's construction business; instead he returns to a life of crime.

programme.title: Where's the Money
programme.desc: A young man from South Central Los Angeles must pledge a fraternity to recover a stash of stolen money.

programme.title: Phat Beach
programme.desc: A teen Romeo pulls an aspiring-writer pal into his plan to sell cheap sunglasses to Southern California beachgoers.

programme.title: Sprung
programme.desc: Friends of each partner conspire to break up new lovers (Tisha Campbell, Rusty Cundieff), then to reconcile them.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: Who Was Geli Bendl?
programme.desc: Only the sheriff (Carroll O'Connor) knows the identity of an actress (Sydne Rome) returned home to Sparta, Miss.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: By Duty Bound
programme.desc: A murder suspect (Corbin Bernsen) works for a businessman running against Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) for sheriff.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: Grow Old Along With Me
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Forbes (Carl Weathers) link a suspect to a witness of a hit-and-run fatality.

programme.title: Phat Beach
programme.desc: A teen Romeo pulls an aspiring-writer pal into his plan to sell cheap sunglasses to Southern California beachgoers.

programme.title: Sprung
programme.desc: Friends of each partner conspire to break up new lovers (Tisha Campbell, Rusty Cundieff), then to reconcile them.

programme.title: 2 Minutes of Fame
programme.desc: A stand-up comic hopes to hit the big time in Los Angeles after he becomes a social media sensation.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: In a spoof of "Fifty Shades of Grey," wealthy entrepreneur Christian Black (Marlon Wayans) introduces a young woman (Kali Hawk) to his kinky world of S&M.

programme.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
programme.desc: A smart teenager (Wiz Khalifa) tries to help a long-term student (Snoop Dogg) finally graduate from high school.

programme.title: Dear White People
programme.desc: A campus culture war between blacks and whites at a predominantly white school comes to a head when the staff of a humor magazine stages an offensive Halloween party.

programme.title: Lucky Girl
programme.desc: Selena has to deal with her high-maintenance friends, her disapproving future mother-in-law, and an ex as her wedding day approaches.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: Who Was Geli Bendl?
programme.desc: Only the sheriff (Carroll O'Connor) knows the identity of an actress (Sydne Rome) returned home to Sparta, Miss.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: By Duty Bound
programme.desc: A murder suspect (Corbin Bernsen) works for a businessman running against Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) for sheriff.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night: Grow Old Along With Me
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Forbes (Carl Weathers) link a suspect to a witness of a hit-and-run fatality.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the Dessert and an ex-F.B.I. Agent and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program must work together.

programme.title: Next Day Air
programme.desc: A courier (Donald Faison) lands in the middle of a drug deal gone awry when he accidentally delivers a box of cocaine to the wrong address.

programme.title: In the Mix
programme.desc: A disc jockey (Usher) must dodge gunfire instead of groupies when he becomes the bodyguard for a mobster's (Chazz Palminteri) beautiful daughter (Emmanuelle Chriqui).

programme.title: Who's Your Caddy?
programme.desc: When members of a stuffy country club oppose his bid to join, a rap mogul (Antwan "Big Boi" Patton) buys the land adjacent to the golf course's 17th hole.

programme.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
programme.desc: A smart teenager (Wiz Khalifa) tries to help a long-term student (Snoop Dogg) finally graduate from high school.

programme.title: The Wash
programme.desc: Two roommates (Dr. Dre, Snoop "Doggy" Dogg) who work at a car wash must save their kidnapped boss (George Wallace) in order to keep their jobs.

programme.title: Snoop Dogg's Hood of Horror
programme.desc: A tagger discovers gangsters don't always die hard, an heir to a Texas oil fortune can't afford to stay alive, and a huge rap star finds a few skeletons in his dressing room ... and they are kicking his door down.

programme.title: Candyman: Farewell to the Flesh
programme.desc: The daughter (Kelly Rowan) of a New Orleans aristocrat ties his murder to the legend of an artist (Tony Todd) fitted with a hook.

programme.title: Out-of-Sync
programme.desc: A Los Angeles DJ (LL Cool J) in debt to bookies falls for the girlfriend of a drug dealer he is watching for the police.

programme.title: In the Mix
programme.desc: A disc jockey (Usher) must dodge gunfire instead of groupies when he becomes the bodyguard for a mobster's (Chazz Palminteri) beautiful daughter (Emmanuelle Chriqui).

programme.title: Who's Your Caddy?
programme.desc: When members of a stuffy country club oppose his bid to join, a rap mogul (Antwan "Big Boi" Patton) buys the land adjacent to the golf course's 17th hole.

programme.title: The Wash
programme.desc: Two roommates (Dr. Dre, Snoop "Doggy" Dogg) who work at a car wash must save their kidnapped boss (George Wallace) in order to keep their jobs.

programme.title: Held Up
programme.desc: Yuppie Alex (Jamie Foxx) stops for gas at a remote convenience store, gets dumped by his fiancee (Nia Long) and becomes a hostage during a robbery.

programme.title: Second Coming
programme.desc: An unexplained pregnancy forces a husband to doubt his wife's faithfulness.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Love and Action in Chicago
programme.desc: A fanatical celibate hit-man (Courtney B. Vance) meets a free-spirited woman (Regina King) on a blind date set up by his mysterious boss, Middleman.

programme.title: Number One With a Bullet
programme.desc: A suave Los Angeles detective (Billy Dee Williams) and his quirky partner (Robert Carradine) hunt a drug lord who has social clout.

programme.title: Never 2 Big
programme.desc: A computer whiz (Shemar Moore) suspected of murder seeks an aspiring actress's (Nia Long) help to elude killers and the law.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: Mobster Ellsworth "Bumpy" Johnson (Laurence Fishburne) vies with rival Dutch Schultz (Tim Roth) for control of illegal gambling in 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: With help from a gangster, a betrayed man (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) seeks revenge for a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Diego le reclama a Martín la relación que tiene con Irene. Celeste le recrimina a Eleazar que haya llevado a sus hijos a un burdel. Micaela, en plena consulta, queda en ropa interior con Martín e Irene entra al consultorio atestiguando todo.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Rodrigo, con sus poderes, orilla a que Diego caiga y se golpee en la cabeza. Martín le reclama a Karín la calumnia que inventó. Jessica queda impávida al ver el odio que Rodrigo le profesa a Diego. Aurora se angustia por el estado de Diego.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Una periodista apasionada de las leyendas mexicanas va hacia Xico, Veracruz a investigar sobre la muerte del padre Sebastián que fue encontrado muerto en brazos de una mujer llamada Altagracia del Toro y muchos misterios sin resolver saldrán a luz.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Orestes busca a Bella, pero ella no soporta tener que ocultar sus sentimientos y lo evade. Por otro lado, Olimpia pasa tiempo en la cárcel y espera el momento de su salida para vengarse.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Chiqui interroga a Orestes porque quiere saber si Franklin tiene razón al sospechar que él es el Lirio de Plata. Chiqui jura atentar contra su vida si Orestes la abandona. En contra de su voluntad, Olimpia debe soportar las órdenes de Bella.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Juana, que busca a su tío, se tropieza con David. Éste, furioso, le advierte que hay algo que debe explicarle. Sol lo mira desconcertada al no saber de qué se trata.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Sol le asegura a Mauricio que aunque esté embarazada, no ha tenido relaciones con ningún hombre. Mauricio es la única persona que no se escandaliza al saber que es virgen y espera un hijo.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Julia y Ezequiel se enfrentan y ella le revela la verdad sobre su boda secreta. Astrid y Max van con el médico y les dice que deben esperar uno o dos años. Celso amenaza a Julia. Elda y Patricia hablan sobre Alfredo. Sebastián defiende a Julia.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Celso amenaza con una pistola a Gregorio y le da un ultimátum. Octavia le reclama a Ezequiel el haber apoyado a Celso. Julia le cuenta a Gregorio que Celso la intentó violar y actúa con ira. Axel comienza a dudar de su fertilidad.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Diego le reclama a Martín la relación que tiene con Irene. Celeste le recrimina a Eleazar que haya llevado a sus hijos a un burdel. Micaela, en plena consulta, queda en ropa interior con Martín e Irene entra al consultorio atestiguando todo.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora's coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes- a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati prepares a true Sonoran feast for the crew - Sonora cheese soup, chicken in pecan and ancho chile sauce.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes traditional tamales with corn, chiles, and cheese, and then for the main course, pork chops topped with a pickled grape salad. In Sonora, she visits a traditional hacienda, where she gets a true taste of Sonoran ranch food.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora's coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie throws a game day party for under $25. Game days aren't for dinner parties but they are a day for some fan-favorite finger foods, especially those you can make in advance. Frankie makes three no-fuss appetizers.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: The struggle is real, but it doesn't mean your food has to suffer. Chef Frankie Celenza shows you how to make delicious meals that won't break the bank.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie prepares a Valentine's Day dinner for under $15 with a bistro-style theme to up the romance. Why go to a crowded restaurant for an overpriced prix-fixe menu with bad service when you can prepare a simple yet decadent romantic meal at home.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Dried beans are affordable and healthy to prepare. Frankie will teach the basics of preparing beans from scratch while making tasty recipes. We also take a field trip to the grocery store to shop the bulk aisle. They're also good for your heart.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It's that time, the first of the month, when you spend your whole paycheck on rent and bills. Your fridge looks pretty sad and the grocery budget is low. Frankie cooks up some go-to pantry meals and also teaches us how to better prepare for this.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie takes us on a magical mushroom trip. They're packed with nutritional value and they're an affordable plant-based meat replacement. We'll learn about all things mushrooms and how to make some inventive, flavorful dishes.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Just because you're dorm living, road tripping, motel living, or haven't gotten that bachelor pad in shape yet, doesn't mean you can't make tasty meals from some handy kitchen (and non-kitchen) appliances. No Kitchen? No problem.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Spring is in the air which means a whole new world opens up in the produce department, especially all the greens. Frankie teaches us how to cook with mother nature, spring-style. It's tasty, seasonably affordable, and pretty to look at.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Flavor, flavor, flavor. Frankie shows us the way around the spice cabinet. You know that area in your pantry that collects dust? Well get ready to dust it off. All it takes is a couple primary dried spices to make a variety of homemade spice blends.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie teaches us how to use whole vegetables, from root-to-stem, which means no food goes to waste. Learn how to use those leafy green tops you thought were for decoration. Or vegetable stalks you would normally throw away.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie explores his Italian roots, pairing each pasta shape with its perfect sauce-from Cavatelli with Super Green Sauce to Pappardelle in pork ragout, ricotta Gnocchi with punchy anchovy pecorino, and cozy Squash Orzotto with bloomed poppy seeds.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie fires up a steakhouse-style spread with Italian flair from golden beets and buttery mushrooms to a sizzling Bistecca alla Fiorentina steak with salmoriglio sauce, and a smooth cold brew affogato granita.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie fuels up for action making hot Oatmeal, and Energy Date Balls, before he cooks up the perfect post-ride feast of cheesy Juicy Lucy Burgers, Ramp-loaded pasta salad, and a maple ginger switchel to cool it all down.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie reunites his old band for a jam session and a spin on a college-era classic - featuring Shoyu Ramen with Tare Eggs, sweet and savory Chicken Meatballs, Seaweed Cucumber Salad, and a crispy Okonomiyaki pancake.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie visits Nashville for smoky BBQ Pork, hand-pulled noodles, a luxe burger, and hand-pulled noodles.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza goes down south to try Austin's best bets - breakfast tacos are on the itinerary, as well as a bangin' beer garden & sausage house, loaded biscuits, and dessert pancakes to boot! Austin may be weird but the food is fabulous.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the one dish wonder of a casserole with a Cajun chicken tray bake and a vegetable lasagna.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Stove Top Pizza with Caramelized Onions and Peppers
programme.desc: Jamie makes super-simple stuffed chicken thighs and a pizza that doesn't need the oven on. He turns the humble pancake into a showstopping stack of spinach, ham and cheesey gorgeousness.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a giant Yorkshire pudding with stuffing and roast veg, cheesy gnocchi with bacon, spicy kipper kedgeree, and easy ice cream, all for under a buck a plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates frozen ingredients to create a scrumptious fish pie, creamy cauliflower cheese spaghetti and a warming minestrone soup, all for under a buck per plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Time Saving Take Out at Home
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up some versatile meatball kebabs, delicious crispy pork noodles, a magnificent carrot puff pastry and a humble crumble, all for under a buck per serving.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Barbecue Chicken, Roast Potatoes and Corn
programme.desc: Jamie takes root veg to another level, makes scrumptious sticky BBQ chicken and turns things upside down with a pineapple cake.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a hearty chicken and veg pie, super-satisfying mushroom risotto, beautiful homemade bread and a no-cook chocolatey fridge cake, all for under a buck a plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Crispy Pork Noodles and Cheesy Chard Cannelloni
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Spring Onion Chicken Curry and Sausage Broccoli Pizza
programme.desc: Jamie elevates asparagus spears for a fishy feat, makes spring onions the star of the show in his spicy green chicken curry and gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie visits Nashville for smoky BBQ Pork, hand-pulled noodles, a luxe burger, and hand-pulled noodles.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Smash Burgers & A Slice in Los Angeles
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza heads to all the buzzworthy spots in LA - cooking up calamari steak at a classic Mexican joint, tasting taro root donuts with fun flavors, grabbing a guanciale slice, and hopping on the line to make cheesy scrumptious smash burgers.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat fishes the coastal inlets of Charleston, South Carolina, in search of a delicious sheepshead, which he plans to grill with his friend and chef James London.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: The Lambert family have spent the last 9 years searching for a home to call their own. To make building their new home affordable, the family discover a futuristic kit house company in Poland.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Bill and Sukie Barber have decided to build a new house in one of their fields using primarily locally sourced materials to fit with their sustainable lifestyle: an ambitious remit in such a secluded corner of the Borders.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: This episode follows a charismatic petrolhead attempting to build a pioneering, eco-home from a kit of parts to house his ten classic cars.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: After years traveling through Europe, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot, but building a traditional house is a challenge.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Delaval and Veronica are restoring 450 acres for conservation and funding it by building a treehouse in Swanton Novers Wood. A Scottish firm constructs it in 7 sections to minimize damage to the woodland habitat on delivery.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Head to the Serra Da Mantiqueira Mountains, Brazil, to explore a 2000 square metre, grid shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker on the Isle of Wight in the UK that's been transformed into an ultra modern home.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds

programme.title: Backyard Builds

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Ashley and Colin can't wait to see how Nicole and Caffery transform Ashely's grandmother's dated bungalow into their new, modern, family home; and Caffery gets Nicole on board with giving his good friend Marlene a much-needed refresh of her home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: After going way over time and budget renovating the main floor of their century home, Jake and Lorraine have run out of steam and need Nicole and Caffery to take on the second floor before their fast-approaching wedding!

programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Top chefs in England take Fred Sirieix to experience amazing restaurants where they genuinely love to eat.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restauranteur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating cafe on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Tasty Ant Eggs in Ninh Binh
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Searching For The Banh Da Noodle in Hai Phong
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delcious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delcious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vitenamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.
